home.seo_title: Mikel's Earth | Natural Products & Gourmet Olive Oil Since 1819
home.seo_description: Natural products and gourmet olive oil handcrafted since 1819. Family tradition, quality and unique gastronomic experiences from Lleida, Spain.
home.hero_subtitle: Since 1819, seven generations have tended the same land, kept the same secrets, shared the same passion.
home.hero_text: We are not a brand. We are a family from Lleida, Spain, who do things the way they were always done: with time, with hands, with soul.
home.manifesto_title: Why We Do What We Do
home.manifesto_p1: In a world where everything is mass-produced, where machines have replaced hands, where speed matters more than quality... we choose a different path.
home.manifesto_p2: We choose slowness. We choose craftsmanship. We choose to do things right, even if it costs more, takes longer, or is harder.
home.manifesto_p3: Because we believe there are things that cannot be automated. Like the love for the land. Like respect for tradition. Like the pride of putting your name on a product.
home.pillar_tradition_text: 7 generations since 1819. Every recipe is a treasure passed from parents to children.
home.pillar_terroir_text: Alcarràs and Córdoba. Lands that produce flavours impossible to replicate.
home.pillar_craft_text: Handmade, unhurried, no shortcuts. Just as it was done 200 years ago.
home.pillar_transparency_text: We open our doors. Come and see how we work.
home.jewels_subtitle: Every product is a treasure. Crafted with dedication, packaged with care, created to honour over 200 years of family tradition.
home.product_paraguayo_desc: The flat peach that won our hearts over a century ago. Sweet, aromatic, perfect.
home.product_temprano_desc: Intense, peppery, full of character. Made from green olives harvested early in the season.
home.product_pack_desc: Discover our entire story in a carefully curated pack.
home.commitment_p1: Part of our profits go to causes close to our hearts. We collaborate with Ileris, a centre for people with special needs who help us package our products with dedication and care. We also support the Agonlinhossouyetokandji Foundation in Benin, which works tirelessly to improve the lives of orphaned children and the elderly.
home.commitment_p2: Because we believe success only makes sense when shared. Because the land has given us so much, and it is time to give back. Every product you buy helps build a fairer, more supportive world.
home.commitment_quote: "Doing good is part of our DNA"
home.cta_subtitle: When you choose Mikel's Earth, you are not just buying a product. You are joining a tradition of over 200 years. You become part of a family that believes in doing things right.
home.cta_visit_text: Discover our workshop and live the experience
home.cta_shop_text: Receive our treasures at your doorstep

reviews_page.page_subtitle: What people who have tried our products say
reviews_page.verified_info_text_1: The "Verified purchase" badge indicates that we have been able to confirm that the person leaving the review has made a real purchase in our shop. Our system automatically cross-references the reviewer's email with our completed order records.
reviews_page.verified_info_text_2: Reviews without this badge are equally valid and real — we simply could not automatically link them to an order (for example, if the customer used a different email from their purchase, or left the review via the public form).
reviews_page.verified_info_text_3: All published reviews are reviewed by our team before appearing on the website. We do not edit or censor negative reviews.
reviews_page.share_experience: Share your experience and receive a 10% discount on your next order as a thank you.

family.title: The Family
family.subtitle: Over 200 years cultivating the land with passion, respect and love
family.history_p1: When our family planted the first tree in the lands of Lleida in 1819, we didn't know we were sowing something much bigger than a tree. We were planting a tradition, a legacy that would span generations and that today, more than two centuries later, is still alive in every jar that leaves our workshop.
family.history_p2: Seven generations have passed since then. Seven generations of hands that have touched the same earth, that have picked the same fruit, that have kept the same production secrets. Each generation has added its own chapter to this story, but all have shared the same philosophy: absolute respect for nature and the relentless pursuit of quality.
family.history_p3: We are not a big corporation. We are a family. And like every family, we have our traditions, our rituals, our recipes passed from parents to children in whispers in the kitchen, in gestures learned since childhood. When you taste our peach in syrup or our early harvest oil, you're not buying a product. You're tasting a piece of our history.
family.timeline_1819_text: 1819 begins cultivating the lands in Alcarràs, Lleida. The passion for the land and artisanal work becomes the DNA of our family.
family.timeline_1920_text: The family workshop rose with the farmhouse, where they spent summers and transformed fruits into preserves for the winter.
family.timeline_1975_title: The Discovery of the Flat Peach
family.timeline_1975_text: The sixth generation discovers the flat peach in Alcarràs. Its unique flavour and perfect texture inspire us to create our first artisanal preserve.
family.timeline_2010_text: We adopt sustainable farming practices and organic certifications. The land that has given us so much deserves our utmost respect.
family.timeline_2024_text: The seventh generation takes the reins. Jordi Giró continues the family legacy, sharing our story with the world through products that honour more than 200 years of tradition.
family.value_tradition_text: Over 200 years of knowledge passed down from generation to generation. Every recipe, every technique, is a family treasure we guard with pride.
family.value_quality_text: There are no shortcuts to excellence. We select each fruit by hand, cook without haste, bottle with care. Quality is non-negotiable.
family.value_authenticity_text: We are who we are. A family from Lleida that loves its land and its products. No artifice, no additives, no lies. Just authenticity.
family.value_sustainability_text: The land has fed us for seven generations. It is our responsibility to care for it for the next seven. Sustainable farming, always.
family.value_transparency_text: We open the doors of our workshop. We show our process. We have nothing to hide, because we do things right.
family.value_passion_text: This is not just a business. It is our life, our story, our legacy. Every product carries our passion in every drop, in every bite.
family.jordi_quote: I am the guardian of a legacy of more than 200 years. Every day I go to the field, I feel the weight of responsibility and the pride of continuing what my ancestors started. My mission is simple: to honour their work by making products they would be proud to taste.
family.jordi_text: From Alcarràs and Córdoba, I share our story with the world. Because I believe that in a world of industrial, soulless products, people deserve to know that families like ours still exist, doing things right, with time, with love, with tradition.
family.cta_text: When you choose Mikel's Earth, you're not just buying a product. You become part of a tradition spanning more than 200 years. You join a family that believes in quality, authenticity and respect for the land.

land.title: Our Land
land.subtitle: From the heart of Lleida to your table
land.hero_subtitle: From the heart of Lleida to your table. Two lands, one passion.
land.intro_p1: Our story is written in two geographical chapters: the fertile lands of Alcarras, in the heart of Lleida, and the centuries-old olive groves of Cordoba. Two different landscapes that share the same spirit: absolute respect for nature.
land.intro_p2: We didn't choose these lands by chance. We inherited them. And with them, we inherited the responsibility to care for them as our ancestors did for over 200 years.
land.alcarras_subtitle: The Birthplace of the Flat Peach
land.alcarras_p1: In the heart of the Segria region, our flat peach orchards stretch beneath the Lleida sun. Here, the continental climate with Mediterranean influence creates the perfect conditions for our flat peaches to develop their characteristic sweetness.
land.alcarras_p2: Every tree is treated with the same care our great-grandfather gave them. Manual pruning, controlled irrigation, and infinite patience waiting for the exact moment of ripeness.
land.cordoba_subtitle: The Liquid Gold of the South
land.cordoba_p1: Our olive groves in the Cordoba countryside produce some of the finest olives in the world. The combination of calcareous soil, Mediterranean climate and the millennia-old oil-making tradition of the area allows us to produce extra virgin olive oils of exceptional quality.
land.cordoba_p2: We work with three varieties that complement each other perfectly:
land.arbequina_desc: Smooth, fruity, with notes of green apple
land.hojiblanca_desc: Balanced, with touches of fresh grass
land.perfect_oil: The perfect combination for our premium oils
land.temprano_p1: Our Temprano oil is made from olives picked green, before full ripening. This gives it an intense, peppery flavour with an elegant bitterness that sets it apart from any other oil.
land.temprano_p2: We only produce a limited quantity each year, because early harvest yields less oil per kilo of olives. But the result is an extraordinary product.
land.sustainability_subtitle: It's not a trend for us. It's been our way of life for 200 years.
land.organic_text: No pesticides or chemicals. Our fields breathe life.
land.water_text: Drip irrigation and ancestral water conservation techniques.
land.biodiversity_text: We maintain ecological corridors and beneficial fauna in our fields.
land.energy_text: Our workshop runs on solar energy and biomass.
land.zero_waste_text: Everything is used. Pruning waste feeds the boiler.
land.certifications_text: Certified organic, integrated production, carbon footprint offset.
land.quote: We care for the land because it's our home. And we want it to remain the home of our grandchildren.
land.cta_title: Taste the Flavour of Our Land
land.cta_text: Every product we make carries the soul of these two lands. The Lleida sun, the Cordoba breeze, the work of seven generations.

workshop.title: The Workshop
workshop.subtitle: Where tradition meets craftsmanship
workshop.hero_subtitle: Where tradition meets craftsmanship. Over 200 years doing things right.
workshop.intro_p1: Our workshop is not a factory. It's an artisan atelier where every product is made with the same dedication our great-grandmother put in a century ago.
workshop.intro_p2: There are no automated production lines or packaging robots here. There are hands. Hands that touch every fruit, stir every pot, seal every jar.
workshop.intro_p3: And you can taste the difference.
workshop.intro_p4: Our process is slow. Deliberately slow. Because haste is the enemy of quality.
workshop.intro_p5: Every batch is small, every cooking is supervised, every product is inspected before leaving.
workshop.intro_p6: We don't mass-produce. We produce with soul.
workshop.intro_p7: And that makes all the difference.
workshop.step1_subtitle: Only the best enters our workshop
workshop.step1_p1: It all starts in the field. We pick each fruit by hand, at its exact point of ripeness. Not a day before, not a day after.
workshop.step1_p2: Those that don't meet our standard are discarded. Only the best, the most aromatic, the most perfect ones reach the workshop.
workshop.step1_p3: It's a demanding process. But it's the only way to guarantee that every jar contains the best of the best.
workshop.step1_highlight: Only 40% of the harvest meets our quality standards.
workshop.step2_p1: Our recipes have been perfected over generations. Each one has its time, its temperature, its secret.
workshop.step2_p2: We cook in copper pots, over low heat, stirring by hand.
workshop.step2_p3: No rush. No shortcuts. No chemicals.
workshop.step2_p4: The syrup is made with sugar and water. Full stop. The jam with fruit and sugar. Full stop.
workshop.step2_p5: We don't need preservatives because we do things the way they were done before.
workshop.step2_p6: And before, things were done right.
workshop.step2_highlight: Cooking times of up to 4 hours to achieve the perfect consistency.
workshop.step3_p1: Every jar is filled by hand. Every label is placed with care. Every box is prepared as if it were a gift.
workshop.step3_p2: Because for us, every product IS a gift. A gift from the land, from tradition, from our family to yours.
workshop.step3_p3: Before leaving the workshop, every batch undergoes visual and organoleptic quality control. If something doesn't convince us, it doesn't leave.
workshop.step3_highlight: Every jar carries a batch number traceable to the field of origin.
workshop.not_found_title: What You WON'T Find in Our Workshop
workshop.not_10: Nothing you wouldn't recognise in your kitchen
workshop.g1_text: Only the best fruit, at its perfect point, hand-selected.
workshop.g2_text: Traditional recipes, slow cooking, no rush or shortcuts.
workshop.g3_text: You know exactly what's inside. Every ingredient is on the label.
workshop.g4_text: Only natural ingredients. Nothing you wouldn't recognise in your kitchen.
workshop.g5_text: Every jar passes through our hands. It's our personal seal.
workshop.g6_text: Over 200 years of know-how in every product.
workshop.worth_title: Why Do Our Products Cost More?
workshop.worth_p1: It's a fair question. And the answer is simple: because we do things right.
workshop.worth_p2: Selecting each fruit by hand takes time. Cooking without haste costs more. Bottling one by one requires more staff. Using only natural ingredients costs more than cheap chemicals.
workshop.worth_p3: But the result is a product that truly tastes real. That is truly healthy. That truly honours tradition. And that, we believe, is worth every penny.
workshop.worth_quote: We don't compete on price. We compete on quality, authenticity, and soul.
workshop.cta_text: Once you try a product made with this care, this dedication, this love... you won't want to go back to industrial products.

jewels.title: Our Treasures
jewels.subtitle: Exceptional products crafted with care
jewels.hero_subtitle: Every product is a treasure. Made with dedication, bottled with care, created to honour over 200 years of tradition.
jewels.intro_text: These aren't just products. They're the result of generations of perfection, of mornings in the field, of afternoons in the workshop. Every jar carries the soul of our land and the work of our family.
jewels.paraguayo_desc: The flat peach from Alcarras, at its perfect point of ripeness, preserved in a light sugar and lemon syrup. No preservatives, no colourants, no artifice.
jewels.paraguayo_story: The flat peach has been with our family for over a century. Our great-grandfather was one of the first to cultivate it in the Alcarras area, and since then each generation has perfected the syrup recipe.
jewels.paraguayo_uses: Direct dessert from the jar, with vanilla ice cream, in cakes and pastries, as a healthy snack, paired with soft cheeses.
jewels.oils_desc: Our EVOO is made from olives from our centuries-old groves in Cordoba. Cold-pressed the same day as harvest to preserve all its aromas and properties.
jewels.oils_story: Our olive groves in Cordoba are over 100 years old. Centuries-old trees that produce olives with a unique aromatic profile, impossible to replicate in young plantations.
jewels.oils_uses: Raw on toast, salad dressings, fish marinades, gourmet baking, finishing oil on hot dishes.
jewels.temprano_desc: Made exclusively from green olives of early harvest. Intense, peppery, with an elegant bitterness. An oil with personality that leaves no one indifferent.
jewels.temprano_story: Temprano is born from the decision to pick olives early. Less yield, more flavour. It's our most exclusive oil and the favourite of chefs.
jewels.temprano_uses: Carpaccios, tartare, premium salads, finishing on grilled meats, gourmet bread with tomato.
jewels.packs_desc: Carefully curated selections for gifting (or treating yourself). Each pack tells a story and offers a complete gastronomic experience.
jewels.packs_story: We create our packs thinking of special moments. Each combination is designed to offer a gastronomic journey through our land.
jewels.packs_uses: Corporate gifts, wedding favours, Christmas hampers, gastronomic experiences, gourmet self-treats.
jewels.special_1_text: We only use ingredients you'd recognise in your kitchen. No chemicals, no artifice.
jewels.special_2_text: Every batch is small and controlled. We prefer quality over quantity.
jewels.special_3_text: Every product can be traced back to the field of origin and date of production.
jewels.special_4_text: From field to table. No warehouses, no distributors, no unnecessary waiting.
jewels.special_5_text: Our recipes have been perfected over generations. They are family treasures.
jewels.special_6_text: Part of our profits go to social causes. Buying is also helping.
jewels.cta_text: Every product is an invitation to discover over 200 years of family tradition. Taste the artisan difference.

experiences.hero_subtitle: We're preparing something very special for you
experiences.hero_description: Workshop visits, olive oil tastings, field experiences... Soon you'll be able to live the Mikel's Earth tradition first-hand.
experiences.preparing_text: We want you to live the complete Mikel's Earth experience. To touch the earth, smell freshly pressed oil, taste our treasures straight from the workshop.
experiences.visit_text: Discover how you can make your own artisan product.
experiences.tasting_text: Learn to distinguish the nuances of a premium extra virgin olive oil. Guided by experts.
experiences.field_text: Experience the flat peach harvest or olive picking. Connect with the land as we do.
experiences.form_subtitle: Leave us your email and we'll let you know when experiences are available. Plus, you'll get priority access to the first spots.
